rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KING HAI HOWE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verifications And Further Responses To Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Tuesday, May 1, 2007. Petitioner Yan Howe's motion to compel verifications. The motion is moot petitioner's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents Granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to special interrogatories #3, 5, and 6. Supplemental verified responses shall be provided within 10 days of notice of this order. The motion is moot as to the request for production of documents Monetary sanctions in the amount of $460 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (BEC/610)
